M1033_HOSP_RISK_WGHT_LOSS M1033 Risk For Hosp - Unintentional weight loss This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to unintentional weight loss of a total o 10 pounds or more in the past 12 months. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x
M1033_HOSP_RISK_MLTPL_HOSPZTN M1033 (M1032) Risk For Hosp - More Than 1 Hospital In 12 Mo This field is checked if the patient is at risk for hospitalization due to multiple hospitalizations
